summary: The actual screenshot shows a gameplay screen with a star map and right-side map key, but deviates from the wireframe in panel visibility, text content, and minor layout details. Overall, it partially aligns with the side panel container description emphasizing left and right panels, but the left panel is not prominently visible, and some elements like debug text are extra.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Dark starfield/game-map background
correctElements.evidence: Both actual and wireframe feature a dark background with star-like elements, matching the specified style.
Top bar present in both with turn, phase, and active player info, aligning with gameplay screen needs.

correctElements.requirement: Screen description: Gameplay screen with game-map background
correctElements.evidence: Map with systems (Sirius, Arcturus, Canopus) connected by lines and orbits appears in both, emphasizing the core gameplay area.
POP, MET, FUEL displays in top bar match in position and purpose, supporting resource management behavior.

correctElements.requirement: Screen description: Right side panel container
correctElements.evidence: Map Key panel with legends is present on the right in both, fulfilling part of the side panel requirement.

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: Emphasizing left and right side panel containers
incorrectElements.expected: Visible left panel container as a fixed-height dock area, shown as a dark rectangle in wireframe
incorrectElements.actual: No visible left panel or content; area appears as empty dark space
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Missing left panel fails to emphasize side panel containers, potentially affecting scrollable content and tool buttons

incorrectElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-SIDE-PANEL-CONTAINER: Visually satisfy documented screen description
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Text mismatch may indicate incorrect game state or inconsistent rendering, not matching the wireframe baseline

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Terminal-style labels, simple rectangles
incorrectElements.expected: Simple resource labels without deltas (e.g., POP 100, MET 50, FUEL 50)
incorrectElements.actual: Resources include deltas (e.g., POP 100 (+2), MET 50 (+1), FUEL 50 (+1))
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Extra delta information adds complexity not present in wireframe, deviating from simple style

incorrectElements.requirement: TR-UI-AUDIT-HWND-001: Actual screenshot from client HWND
incorrectElements.actual: Extra text like 'Panels F1 Dbg:Off F2 Cmd:Off ...' above resources
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Debug or extra text not in wireframe suggests development artifacts in production screenshot, impacting visual fidelity

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: Right side panel container with content
incorrectElements.expected: 'Selected' panel above Map Key on right
incorrectElements.actual: No 'Selected' panel; only Map Key present
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Missing panel reduces right side container functionality, not matching wireframe's multi-panel setup

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Fixed screen-relative geometry
incorrectElements.actual: 'top=107' text at bottom left and right
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Extra debug info disrupts clean geometry and is not part of the wireframe, indicating residual development elements

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Fixed screen-relative geometry
incorrectElements.expected: Precise positions as in wireframe (e.g., systems aligned diagonally with specific spacing)
incorrectElements.actual: Slightly different spacing and positions, with Canopus lower and more elements
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Minor bounds and nesting differences could affect usability, though close; residual risk in pixel-perfect matching due to rendering variations

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframe provides a good baseline for overall layout and style but lacks details on scrollable content, top tool buttons, and interactive elements, making it insufficient for fully validating behavioral requirements like scrolling and docking.
missingRequirements: Indication of scrollable areas within side panels
Representation of small top tool buttons in panels
Details on content nesting and z-order for dynamic UI behavior
recommendedWireframeChanges: Add simple scrollbar placeholders in side panels to indicate scrollability
Include small rectangle buttons at panel tops labeled as tools
Annotate panels with notes on fixed-height docking and content overflow
